questions.question:
Suppose \( 3 \) elements are hashed independently and uniformly at random one by one to slots in a hash table of size \( 6 \) (assume that in case of a collision, the element is hashed to the first free slot). What is the expected number of elements that \( \text{DO NOT} \) collide with an existing element in the table?



Algorithms: TIFR CSE 2025 | Part B | Question: 10
